title: Viktor Frankl
html:
Stub. Austrian psychiatrist + Holocaust survivor (1905–1997), author of Man's Search for Meaning. Functions in Yahir's corpus as one of the canonical meaning-anchors he reaches for when reorganizing identity around adversity.

In-vault appearances

  • 2022 04 12 instead of osig — listed (as "Victor frankl") as one of three plan-B identity pillars (Python study + half-marathon training + Frankl) if Yahir doesn't get into OSIG.
  • voluntary adversity as philosophy synthesis — Frankl appears in the broader voluntary-adversity arc.

Why it matters

Frankl is the first explicit philosophical-anchor name Yahir reaches for in 2022 when asked to construct a meaning-source from scratch. The fact that Frankl shows up alongside physical (half marathon) and technical (Python) pillars — rather than alongside other thinkers — means Yahir is treating philosophical reading as a co-equal axis with body and skill. That triple recurs through 2024–2026 as the fitfo + supplement stack + soul as beacon frame.
